title: 最強サイコーとはズバリ！！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Bamboo Memory's senior year has
come to a close...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer and Bamboo Memory. I apologize
for interrupting your training session, but I was
hoping to speak with you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna! Wow, I don't usually see you around here.
What's up?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I actually have some good news for you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The URA has announced Bamboo Memory as the
recipient of the Best Sprinter award!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Really! Congratulations, you two!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I DID IT!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I did it, I did it! I DID IT! YESSSSS!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Best Sprinter! Can you believe it?! WOOHOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'M THE BEST OF THE BEST!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's only natural for her to be overcome
with emotion.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I won BEST SPRINTER! I'm the
ULTIMATE sprinter! YEEEAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory runs about wildly, whooping
loudly in celebration and leaving tears glittering
like stars in her wake.

text_block_list.name: Student in Tracksuit A
text_block_list.text:
So you won Best Sprinter?! That's awesome,
Bamboo Memory!

text_block_list.name: Student in Tracksuit B
text_block_list.text:
You were amazing at the Sprinters Stakes! But
wow, your voice sure carries! I bet people on the
other side of the track heard you too.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What wonderful news... I have to inform Chiyono
O and Ardan immediately.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And I must redouble my own efforts as well!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Look at her jumping around like a little kid. I
doubt there'll be a quiet moment in our room
once she gets back.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Congrats, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: We're celebrating for sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, word of Bamboo Memory's
achievement spreads across campus like wildfire.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later, during the award ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory! Congratulations on winning
Best Sprinter!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much! This is such an honor!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
After your astounding performance in the Mile
Championship, I think it's safe to say you're one
of the most popular racer in your generation!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Could you please tell us your goals and ambitions
for your future races?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Since you're asking, then I'll take this
chance to make an announcement I've been
sitting on!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: This award proves my credentials as the ultimate sprinter right now ! However...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's only proof of my current ability! There's no telling if I'll still be the ultimate sprinter in the future!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can't rest on my laurels! I'm gonna
keep on turning up the heat so I can win this
award again next year!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So listen up...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All you sprinters out there! And not just the
current ones—I'm talking to all you would-be
sprinters as well!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Come at me with everything you've got! Just try
and take this title from me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's run in the ultimate race—one grand enough
to hold all of our dreams!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
BURN BRIGHT, Twinkle Series! Let's bring the
heat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, Bamboo Memory's passionate
declaration sets everyone's expectations ablaze
for races yet to come!
